---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new kernel feature, driver, or subsystem
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
One-line description of the feature.

## Subsystem
- [ ] Kernel core (scheduler, memory, IPC)
- [ ] Drivers (disk, network, USB, GPU)
- [ ] Filesystem
- [ ] Syscalls
- [ ] Userspace (shell, terminal, daemons)
- [ ] Build system / tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Problem
What problem does this solve? Why is it needed for the next phase?

## Proposed approach
How should this be implemented? Reference relevant kernel modules or
architecture docs if applicable.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse.

## Phase alignment
Which phase does this fit into? (See `README.md` roadmap)

## Complexity estimate
- [ ] Small — single file, < 200 lines
- [ ] Medium — new module or significant changes to existing one
- [ ] Large — new subsystem, cross-cutting changes
- [ ] Unknown — needs investigation

## References
Links to specs, OSDev Wiki pages, or other OS implementations.
